# Inheribase: Inheritance Infrastructure

> Inheritance infrastructure that ensures your most important files reach the right people. Encrypted on your device, stored on Arweave's permanent storage network, delivered to your heirs automatically.

## Core Platform
- **Vaults**: Institutional-grade digital safes with zero-knowledge encryption.
- **People**: Guardians (trusted recovery contacts) and Heirs (successors).
- **Triggers**: Condition-based release (Dead Man's Switch, Guardian Claim).
- **Permanence**: All data is stored on Arweave with a 200-year endowment.
- **Privacy**: No human (including Inheribase) can decrypt vault contents without authorization.

## AI-Assisted Estate Planning
- **MCP Server**: Connect your local AI assistant (Claude Desktop, Cursor) to manage your vault via the Model Context Protocol.
- **Heritage Assistant**: Your AI helps organize, encrypt, and store digital assets under your authority.
- **Scoped Access**: AI tools use restricted API keys — they cannot modify your succession plan.

## Core Directives
- **Code is Reality**: Documentation is derived from the protocol's cryptographic truth.
- **Human-First**: Your vault belongs to you. AI is a tool, not a tenant.

## Reference Paths
- [/getting-started](/getting-started): For humans starting their heritage journey.
- [/agents/mcp-server](/agents/mcp-server): MCP integration for local AI assistants.
- [/agents/api](/agents/api): Full REST API reference for developers.
